visual_description:
A medium shot captures three men standing in a dimly lit, cluttered room. The central figure, a man with platinum blonde hair, is dressed in a black coat. He points a wand forward with a determined expression. Flanking him are two other men, also in dark clothing, mirroring his action of pointing their wands forward. The background is filled with dark, ornate furniture and objects, creating a chaotic and shadowy atmosphere. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the top right corner. The camera remains static, focusing on the tense standoff. The audio opens with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient score, creating a tense and foreboding atmosphere.

The scene cuts to a medium close-up of a young man with dark hair and round glasses. He wears a brown jacket over a dark shirt. He looks slightly off-camera with a calm but serious expression. The background is dark and out of focus, showing the same cluttered, dimly lit environment. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is steady, holding the focus on the man's face. A male voice speaks in a calm, steady, and slightly weary tone, delivering the line, "You knew it
